reviews.review_description: Swivel is an absolute gem on Meta Quest, a uniquely joyful VR experience that keeps pulling me back in. I didn’t expect to play it this much, but there’s something addictive about spinning through those cosmic tracks. Simple, clever, unique, and just pure fun!

This is probably one of the best games I’ve bought. Most of the games require you to stand. I love this game, because it makes you move, at the same times it’s fun. Love the music, especially track 3! Hopefully they will add more tracks like that.
This is by far my favorite game! I definitely recommend

This game is so incredibly fun! If you get dizzy easily by spinning than it is not recommended. But worth a try anyways ☺️ I cannot wait until they get more song choices. I've been recommending this game to a few of my friends and I can't wait for them to try it!

It’s great movement if someone has limited mobility. I am scared of heights so some areas freaked me out a little especially with sudden turns. Dance party at the end of each level is a fun addition especially since it gives you extra points.
